# Topic Blurbs — External Meeting (2025‑09‑19)

1) International experience → resilience and adaptability  [00:40–02:39]
International moves compound resilience, adaptability, and network‑building—an “unfair advantage” that compounds over a career. Use it as a narrative spine for PM growth stories.

2) Soft skills as “base athleticism”  [07:21–08:57]
The substrate for everything else is the ability to learn quickly and connect deeply. A lightweight toolkit for communication, feedback loops, and relationship leverage is worth more than narrow hard‑skill checklists.

3) AI usage: judgment and context‑window intuition  [09:45–11:35]
Outcomes depend on judgment: knowing when you’re at the edge of a model’s context window and how to structure prompts/reviews. Teach a “prompt → check → refine” loop, not incantations.

4) Go‑to‑market focus: ICP PMs; buyers Seed–Series A–C  [22:52–24:41]
Start with PMs where signal is highest; on the buyer side, early‑stage teams seeking one or two great PMs with minimal noise.

5) Engagement scope with Shujaat  [31:15–36:18]
Offer scoped involvement tiers and pick a pilot: either a weekly “AI & Careers” myth‑busting series or the “base athleticism” toolkit. Lock success metrics, timelines, and the next review date.
